mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rising unemployment rates signal deteriorating labor market conditions that reduce corporate profit expectations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in GDP and industrial production indicate weakening aggregate demand, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through reduced corporate revenue expectations.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 declines > 1% in 4mo and INDPRO declines > 0.5% in 2mo
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A tightening monetary policy regime, indicated by rising federal funds rates and inflation, increases discount rates and reduces equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production growth signals robust corporate activity, increasing earnings expectations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts indicate improving consumer confidence and demand, boosting corporate revenues and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of non-triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth combined with declining unemployment signals a tightening labor market, increasing wage pressures and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: A dovish monetary policy stance, indicated by low federal funds rates and rising consumer credit, lowers borrowing costs and stimulates equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.
